hypothesis: Applying Support Vector Machines to time series forecasting in economics can improve prediction accu

issues: The proposed experiment lacks a clear description of the baseline model for comparison
The dataset used for training and testing the Support Vector Machine is not specified
The proposed experiment lacks a clear description of the data structure and its relevance to the economics domain
The success criterion is based on mean squared error and mean absolute error, but it does not account for other important metrics in time series forecasting
The experiment does not provide a clear comparison to other machine learning models or techniques
The proposed experiment does not fully capture the non-linear relationships between variables in economic time series data
The success criterion is based on a fixed threshold, which may not be suitable for all economic time series data
